name: per_player_opportunity_rate_type
description: Test case for per_player_opportunity rate type (pass attempts excluding sacks + rush attempts + targets denominator)
expected_query: with "t13fb6eec0d4ea54730f87bd0a613f082" as materialized (select "t"."pid" as "pid", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" cross join LATERAL (VALUES (CASE WHEN nfl_plays.sk IS NULL OR nfl_plays.sk = false THEN nfl_plays.psr_pid END), (nfl_plays.bc_pid), (nfl_plays.trg_pid)) AS t(pid) where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and t.pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "t"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS m_3bf5855c3202 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379.m_3bf5855c3202) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t13fb6eec0d4ea54730f87bd0a613f082.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS trg_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t13fb6eec0d4ea54730f87bd0a613f082" on "t13fb6eec0d4ea54730f87bd0a613f082"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" on "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
